_description: Teaching loop queue. Each entry is one real-world agent use case. Pick the next pending item by priority and scaffold it with the 4-phase commit protocol in AGENTS.md.

queue.description: Hello world ReAct agent -- model loops through reason-act-observe with math tools
Classify inbound emails by urgency and category -- first real-world structured extraction
Extract vendor, amount, date, and line items from invoice text using Pydantic schemas
Score inbound sales leads against ICP criteria and recommend next action
Classify support tickets by type and urgency, route to the right team, draft first response
Score resumes against a job spec and surface top candidates with reasoning
Extract requirements, deadlines, and scoring criteria from procurement RFP text
Supervisor agent coordinates a researcher sub-agent and a writer sub-agent to produce a research brief
